center.name: 塔波拉區
center.summary: 塔波拉區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Maasai apalis，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Places where it is found include Songwe, Arusha, Tabora, Maasai Mara, and the Serengeti. The species is only found in patches of whistling thorn that are very tall and dense

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Places where it is found include Songwe, Arusha, Tabora, Maasai Mara, and the Serengeti. The species is only found in patches of whistling thorn that are very tall and dense
